text_block_list.text: Can you believe in that which you cannot see?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You're incredibly fast, without a doubt... I'm going to have to
do better than this...
That which is only beheld in the eyes of another?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...So that I can catch up... to my friend...
Who exactly are you?
It's well past dusk when I realize I've forgotten my phone somewhere.

I probably set it down while focusing on watching some training
sessions around the academy today.

I jog back to where I assume I've left the thing, and am reassuringly
greeted by a flashing low-battery light.
Hehe...

—s is fun... hehe...
—ow can I... —atch up?

I don't expect to hear anything on the track at this hour, let alone
laughter. Is someone really out here training right now?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Phew... Don't worry... I can keep going.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...That's right. However many more times it takes...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I really love... running with you...
choice_data_list: (Just, uh... who is she talking to?)

text_block_list.text:
There's certainly no one around besides us. I know that it's quite dark
out, but still. Thinking it strange, I approach the lone student, when...
Thwack!

It feels as if something has rammed into my shoulder. I can't see
anything in the vicinity, however.

But a girl talking to someone who isn't there? And then myself
colliding with some kind of invisible force?

The night air isn't the only thing giving me the chills... Though it's
probably just my imagination running wild...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Are you for real? I'll gladly take up the offer! It's always been my
dream to make it big in a G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: For real. Let's turn that dream into reality!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! I've been aiming to debut in the Twinkle Series this whole
time, so...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I sense you've got what it takes. I'll be back to watch your tryout race.
Think you can show me everything you've got?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
choice_data_list: Oh, right. The girl from last night...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, <username>! Looks like you've got your
eyes on someone.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the girl over there? ...She does run with mighty fine form. Are you
gonna scout her?
choice_data_list: Well, I'm not so sure just yet...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Really? I've definitely seen her somewhere, though... Um, maybe in
these pamphlets, yeah?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Found her—Manhattan Cafe. She's good. If you're not going to scout
her, then I'm off to chat to her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You want... to scout me?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! If you don't have anyone else in mind, why don't we aim for the
top of the Twinkle Series together?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: You can outrun anyone else out here for sure!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Anyone else? Hm... Do you think... I could even outrun... her?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: ..."Her"? Who? Oh, I'm guessing you have a rival then?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. She's incredibly fast... That girl standing right over there...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: O-over there? But there's no one th—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: She looks like me... She's the one who led me here. My dear friend...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't changed since we were children... Always running ahead of
me... I dream of... reaching her...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Huh...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Save your breath. Don't think she's looking to really talk to anyone, let alone be scouted.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't make heads or tails of anything she was babbling about... It
was like she was trying to drive me off. And honestly, the things she
was saying were kind of, uh...

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Kind of creepy?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I'm just saying that maybe you shouldn't bother. She seems to be
more trouble than anything...
I'm reminded of what happened last night.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...That's right. However many more times it takes...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I really love... running with you...

I chalk up all that happened last night to my imagination, but perhaps
there is something more at play here.
Does she really not have any interest in being scouted?

My mind drifts, pondering the mysterious Manhattan Cafe. Next thing
I know, the sky has darkened into a murky night...
